scripts.memomesh:demo: node memomesh/src/memomesh.js create --input polish-solana-ecosystem/article.md --out memomesh/examples/polish-article-receipt.json --title "Polish Solana Ecosystem Research"
scripts.test: npm run narrative:run && npm run memomesh:demo && node memomesh/src/memomesh.js verify-file --input polish-solana-ecosystem/article.md --receipt memomesh/examples/polish-article-receipt.json && npm run skill:rpc:check >/tmp/solana-rpc-reliability-test.json
